pr.title: feat: Aider agent, issue creation, docs discovery, and reliability fixes
pr.body:
## Summary
- Auto-discover all `.md` files in root + `docs/` tree (up to 3 levels) during planning — fixes architect ignoring docs folder
- Follow GitHub API redirects and strip trailing slashes in `list_directory()`
- Create GitHub issue from natural language prompt (LLM-structured)
- Aider agent integration for autonomous issue implementation
- `sync_issues` now imports GitHub issues not yet in Automatron
- Fix `implement_with_aider` crash (nonexistent import)
- Fallback to `uvx`/`uv` if `aider` binary not in PATH
- Fix `call_llm` signature in `create_issue_from_prompt`
- Replace Docker CLI subprocess calls with Python SDK in preview runner
- Richer issue bodies for Copilot (stack context + detailed notes)

## Test plan
- [ ] Start a new project — verify architect reads all `.md` files in `docs/` and root
- [ ] Sync issues — verify manually created GitHub issues appear in Automatron
- [ ] Create issue from prompt — verify structured GitHub issue is created
- [ ] Click Implement on an issue — verify Aider picks it up and opens a PR

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
pr.author: dev-quitcode
